sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103602" key="tetremai/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετρεμαίνω</orth>, redupl. form of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τρέμω, τετρεμαίνειν Ἀττικῶς, τρέμειν Ἑλληνικῶς</foreign> Moer.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0008.tlg001.perseus-grc1:p.365" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.365</biblScope> </bibl> P.; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τετραμαίνω</foreign>.</entryFree>
